resume.paragraph_1: A Web Developer with a strong foundation in Front-End development and a passion for building fast, responsive, and user-centric digital experiences. Since starting my journey in 2020, I have honed my skills in modern tech stacks like React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS to bridge the gap between creative design and functional code.
resume.paragraph_2: My professional path began with a background in cinematography and creative design, which evolved into a dedicated career in web technology. Currently, I thrive as a Freelance Front-End Developer, delivering high-quality solutions while continuously exploring the ever-evolving landscape of web development.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Jakarta-based Freelance Web Developer specializing in React.js, Next.js & Tailwind CSS. Building fast, responsive, and modern web solutions for businesses across Indonesia.

resume.paragraph_1: I'm Mohamad Reza Reziyanto, a Jakarta-based Web Developer dedicated to building impactful digital solutions. I specialize in developing web platforms using a modern tech stack, including React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS, focusing on creating seamless user experiences.
resume.paragraph_2: My journey in the digital world began in 2020, rooted in a background of cinematography and creative design. This unique blend of visual storytelling and technical expertise allows me to approach web development with both a creative eye and a results-driven mindset.
resume.paragraph_3: I thrive in collaborative environments and leverage my skills in proactive communication and critical thinking to ensure every project delivers logical clarity and a real-world impact. Currently, I am focused on my journey as a Freelance Front-End Developer.
